meaning: n.用公式表示,明确地表达,作简洁陈述
examples: This is a far weaker formulation than is in the draft resolution which is being proposed.
For such people and many more perhaps not so exceptional, the proper formulation is, "Succeed at all costs but avoid appearing ambitious."
According to this formulation, highly creative activity transcends the limits of an existing form and establishes a new principle of organization.
He - or his advisers - have hit on a curious formulation to achieve this.
Arafat has signaled his support for this formulation, as have a number of other Arab leaders.
